title: Including the emailadress / name of the recipient of a mail posted to the update of a pulse
excerpt: In my company we use the email to update feature a lot. If we send an email to someone, we BCC in the pulse-id from update section. That is all good and dandy. What I wpuld like is for the head of the email containing th…

posts.author: bjornheldaas (Bjørn Heldaas)
posts.cookedHtml: In my company we use the email to update feature a lot. If we send an email to someone, we BCC in the pulse-id from update section. That is all good and dandy. What I wpuld like is for the head of the email containing the reciever of the email (emailadress) to show in the update.

posts.author: FredW (Frederik Wongel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Has anything happened in this regard?
We would also very much like to see this implemented.
It is not always 100% clear who the email was originally sent to (especially if there were multiple recipients!), so it would be very useful to have the email-header included in the update when an email is sent as BCC to an item via a pulse.
